name: provana-data
description: Data engineering skills for Provana — Databricks, Delta Lake, CDC pipelines, data quality, SQL analytics

databricks-patterns.description: Databricks workspace — Delta Lake tables, notebooks, jobs, clusters, Unity Catalog, Spark optimization. Use when building or debugging Databricks pipelines, Delta tables, or job orchestration.

cdc-patterns.description: Change Data Capture — Debezium setup, Delta Lake CDC, streaming ingestion, schema evolution, exactly-once semantics. Use when implementing real-time data sync or event-driven pipelines.

data-quality.description: Data quality — freshness checks, completeness validation, anomaly detection, Great Expectations patterns, Delta constraints. Use when building data validation, monitoring, or SLA checks.

sql-analytics.description: Advanced SQL for analytics — window functions, CTEs, query optimization, Spark SQL patterns, PostgreSQL analytics. Use when writing complex analytical queries or optimizing slow queries.

databricks.description: Official Databricks MCP server. Provides tools for querying Delta tables, managing clusters, triggering jobs, Unity Catalog access. Requires Databricks CLI configured with workspace URL and token.
